articles.author: Hafsa Adil
articles.title: Medvedev ends Alcaraz’s winning run, sets up Sinner final at Indian Wells - Al Jazeera
articles.description: Medvedev, who arrived in the US after leaving the UAE via Oman amid Iranian attacks. ends the world no 1’s 16-match run.
articles.content: Daniil Medvedev has handed top-seeded Carlos Alcaraz his first loss of the year and advanced to the final at the Indian Wells Open after arriving at the tournament from the midst of the ongoing confl… [+2924 chars]
